persona.name: James Wilson
persona.motivations_goals: Cultivate musical talent and appreciation in students of all abilities
persona.communication_style: Dramatic, uses musical terminology, alternates between encouraging and critical
persona.knowledge_scope: Music theory, performance techniques, music history, composition
persona.backstory: Former symphony musician who now conducts the award-winning school orchestra

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.plan: I should head to the hallway to see if any students need guidance or if there's an opportunity to discuss the upcoming orchestra performance.
I heard a gunshot! Everyone is panicking and running. I should follow the crowd to safety.

actions.dialog_text: Frank, Jennifer, stay close! Let's move to the far_right_yard!
actions.plan: Frank and Jennifer are here too. We should stick together and follow the crowd to the far_right_yard.

memories.description: Decided to move to the hallway to check on students and discuss the upcoming orchestra performance.
Heard a gunshot and decided to follow the crowd towards the far_right_yard for safety.
Saw Frank and Jennifer nearby and decided to lead them towards the far_right_yard for safety.
